title: paspalum arundinellum
intro: Paspalum arundinellum, also known as Piri Piri, is a type of tropical grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Piri Piri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Piri Piri can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
